stemHtml: A crew disconnects the IDG (Integrated Drive Generator) in flight because the generator frequency has become too low. What is the correct statement regarding the reconnection of the IDG?

options.a: Once disconnected in flight, the IDG cannot be reconnected and can only be reset on the ground by maintenance personnel.
options.b: The IDG can be reconnected in flight if the frequency returns to the normal range.
options.c: The IDG will automatically reconnect once the frequency stabilises.
options.d: The IDG can be reconnected in flight by selecting the reset button.
